ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: casdoor/casdoor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor
Language: go
An open-source Agent-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /LLM MCP & agent gateway and auth server with web UI supporting OpenClaw, MCP, OAuth, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cli/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cli/cli
Language: go
GitHub’s official command line tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evcc-io/evcc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evcc-io/evcc
Language: go
solar charging ☀️🚘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/beads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/beads
Language: go
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/gascity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gascity
Language: go
Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-git/go-git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-git/go-git
Language: go
A highly extensible Git implementation in pure Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/osv-scanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/osv-scanner
Language: go
Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided by https://osv.dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/vault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
Language: go
A tool for secrets management, encryption as a service, and privileged access management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jackc/pgx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jackc/pgx
Language: go
PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/typescript-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go
Language: go
Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap
Language: go
Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pingcap/tidb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb
Language: go
TiDB is built for agentic workloads that grow unpredictably, with ACID guarantees and native support for transactions, analytics, and vector search. No data silos. No noisy neighbors. No infrastructure ceiling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocketbase/pocketbase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocketbase/pocketbase
Language: go
Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: runatlantis/atlantis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis
Language: go
Terraform Pull Request Automation

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
